title: tephrosia corallicola
intro: Tephrosia corallicola is a species of flowering plant in the legume family, Fabaceae, native to tropical Africa. This plant has been traditionally used in African medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions. The Tephrosia corallicola plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing pain and inflammation, and improving overall well-being. Herbal preparations of Tephrosia corallicola include infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
